session_info.approach: Role-based anchor insertion v9 — INDICATOR_FLAG + rn_ naming + consistency retry

_classification_notes.Cardiac_Cath: agg_date=MAX, agg_enc=SUM → HYBRID by evidence table rules. However evidence table shows agg_date_raw=MAX and agg_enc_raw=SUM. HYBRID classification applies. NOTE: #Step4 applies encounter-level MAX suppression via IIF chain. The HYBRID classification means one winner per ServiceDate, then summed across dates.
_classification_notes.PTCA: agg_date=MAX, agg_enc=SUM → HYBRID by evidence table rules.
_classification_notes.Lithotripsy: agg_date=MAX, agg_enc=SUM → HYBRID by evidence table rules.
_classification_notes.Chemotherapy: agg_date=MAX, agg_enc=SUM → HYBRID by evidence table rules.
_classification_notes.IOP: agg_date=MAX, agg_enc=SUM → HYBRID by evidence table rules. Placeholder $0 column but pattern is HYBRID.
_classification_notes.COVID: agg_date=MAX, agg_enc=MAX → MAX. But CASE produces binary 0/1 only → INDICATOR_FLAG. Placed in indicator_flag_categories only.
_classification_notes.AS_slot_composite: AS is a WINDOW_REDUCTION: LEAD slots AS1-AS10 are individually MAX-aggregated in AGGREGATE_DATE and the composite MAX(AS1)+...+MAX(AS10) is the AGGREGATE_DATE output. The encounter-level step sums this composite across dates (SUM of the date-level composites). This is the standard WINDOW_REDUCTION pattern — classified as WINDOW_REDUCTION, not HYBRID.
_classification_notes.Mammography_Reduction_slot_composite: Same WINDOW_REDUCTION pattern as AS via Rad1-Rad10 slots.
_classification_notes.line_level_source_table_column_check: #Step3 is built with an EXPLICIT COLUMN LIST from #Step2. It does NOT use SELECT *. The explicit list includes: EncounterID, ServiceDate, OP_Default, AS1-AS10 (LEAD slots), Rad1-Rad10 (LEAD slots), Mammography_NoReduction, Fee_Schedule, ER, AS_Default, Cardiac_Cath, PTCA, EPS, Lithotripsy, Gamma_Knife, Implants, Blood, Drugs, Chemotherapy, Lab, Clinic, Hyperbaric, IV_Therapy, IOP, Partial_Hospitalization, Observation, Psych, ECT, Miscellaneous, Home_Health, COVID. ABSENT from #Step3: RevenueCode, ProcedureCode, Sequence, Amount, BillCharges, Quantity, Modifier1, ServiceDateFrom, ServiceDateTo, OriginalPayment, ProcedureCodeNumeric, ASC_Group, Plan, Payer01Code, Payer01Name, AGE, Mammography_Reduction raw column (replaced by Rad slots), AS raw column (replaced by AS slots). EPS uses BillCharges in LINE_PRICING (Round(BillCharges * 0.74, 2)) — BillCharges is NOT present in #Step3. A JOIN back to #Step1_Charges or #Step2 is required for BillCharges if EPS LinePayment is to be recomputed at line level. All LEAD slot columns (AS1-AS10, Rad1-Rad10) ARE present in #Step3 confirming it is the correct source.
narrow_list_payment_columns_requiring_jo: BillCharges (needed for EPS = Round(BillCharges * 0.74, 2)); source: #Step2 or #Step1_Charges joined on EncounterID + Sequence
_classification_notes.self_check_hybrid_reclassification: After applying evidence-table rules strictly: Cardiac_Cath (agg_date=MAX, agg_enc=SUM)=HYBRID; PTCA (agg_date=MAX, agg_enc=SUM)=HYBRID; Lithotripsy (agg_date=MAX, agg_enc=SUM)=HYBRID; Chemotherapy (agg_date=MAX, agg_enc=SUM)=HYBRID; IOP (agg_date=MAX, agg_enc=SUM)=HYBRID; Partial_Hospitalization (agg_date=MAX, agg_enc=SUM)=HYBRID; Observation (agg_date=MAX, agg_enc=SUM)=HYBRID; Psych (agg_date=MAX, agg_enc=SUM)=HYBRID; ECT (agg_date=MAX, agg_enc=SUM)=HYBRID; Home_Health (agg_date=MAX, agg_enc=SUM)=HYBRID. These are moved to hybrid_categories below.

insertions.description: DROP TABLE safety lines for #bRanked, #bSlots, #LineBreakdown in the cleanup block
insertions.anchor_preview: IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#StepFinal') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #StepFinal
insertions.new_content_preview:
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#bRanked')       IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #bRanked
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#bSlots')        IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #bSlots
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#LineBreakdown') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #LineBreakdown
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#recon_temp')    IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #recon_temp

insertions.anchor_preview:
update  s
	set s.[Implants]= i.implants
	from #Step4 s
	inner join #implants i on i.EncounterID = s.encounterid
	where s.[AS] > 0
insertions.new_content_preview:
--=======================================================================
-- *** [PRICE BREAKDOWN - INSERTED SECTION] ***
-- SOURCE  : #Step3 (post-LEAD slot computation, pre-hierarchy)
--           joined to #Step4 for encounter-level suppression decisions.
--           #Step2 joined for BillCharges (required for EPS payment formula).
--
-- MAX CATEGORIES (one winner per encounter):
--   ER, EPS, Gamma_Knife
--
-- HYBRID CATEGORIES (MAX per ServiceDate in AGGREGATE_DATE, SUM in AGGREGATE_ENC;
--   one winner per EncounterID+ServiceDate):
--   Cardiac_Cath, PTCA, Lithotripsy, Chemotherapy, IOP

insertions.description: Price_Breakdown_Detail correlated subquery as last column in FINAL_JOIN SELECT
insertions.new_content_preview:
, [Price_Breakdown_Detail] = (
		SELECT STRING_AGG(
			'Seq:'  + CAST(lb.[Sequence]      AS VARCHAR(MAX)) +
			' CPT:' + ISNULL(CAST(lb.[ProcedureCode] AS VARCHAR(MAX)), '') +
			' Rev:' + ISNULL(CAST(lb.[RevenueCode]   AS VARCHAR(MAX)), '') +
			' | Cat:'     + CAST(lb.[ServiceCategory]  AS VARCHAR(MAX)) +
			' | Billed:$' + CAST(CONVERT(DECIMAL(12,2), ISNULL(lb.[BilledAmount], 0)) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) +
			' | Paid:$'   + CAST(CONVERT(DECIMAL(12,2), ISNULL(lb.[LinePayment],   0)) AS VARCHAR(MAX))
		, ' || ')
		WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY lb.[Sequence])
		FROM #LineBreakdown lb
		WHERE lb.[EncounterID

insertions.description: Auditor Query 1 + INSERT + Query 2 reconciliation appended after final OUTPUT SELECT
insertions.anchor_preview:
Select [Status], count(*)
From #StepFinal
Group by [Status]
order by count(*) desc
insertions.new_content_preview:
--======================================================================
-- *** [AUDITOR PRICE BREAKDOWN SUMMARY QUERIES - INSERTED SECTION] ***
-- Run these after the main script completes.
-- #LineBreakdown = one row per charge line (EncounterID + Sequence).
-- ServiceCategory = final hierarchy decision (from #Step4 suppression logic).
-- 'Suppressed_By_Hierarchy' = line matched a category but a higher-tier
--   category won for this encounter.
-- 'No_Payment_Category' = line did not match any pricing pattern.
-- BundledByNCCI = 0 (no NCCI bundle step in this script).
--=====================
